title: odontarrhena dubertretii
intro: Odontarrhena dubertretii, also known as Dubertret's toothwort, is a flowering plant in the saxifrage family native to China. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Dubertret's toothwort is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
